source: Android and iOS BlePsFtpClient notification continuation timeout planning vector

causeMessageContains: Failed to receive notification packet in timeline

commonDecision.errorPolicy: continuation timeout after an RFC76 MORE frame is a protocol timeout distinct from initial silence, RFC76 error frames, and transport-status failures

notes: This vector intentionally documents a long-duration timeout path that should not be executed against wall-clock protocol time. Android waits for the next D2H packet after a MORE frame and wraps the timeout as Notification receive failed. iOS waits for the next D2H packet and currently maps an absent packet to BlePsFtpException.responseError(errorCode: -1). KMP migration should introduce a typed continuation-timeout error and facade adapters should intentionally preserve or normalize the current public error split.
